summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UI/UX fixes and optimizations. All major features are working correctly including seamless logo ticker animation, slow star drift effects, mobile process section with vertical connecting lines, and premium Über uns page design.
passed_tests: Logo ticker seamless infinite scroll animation (30s duration, translateX -33.333%)
Stars slow drift animation (25-60s duration, 8-20px movements)
Process section vertical connecting lines on mobile (lg:hidden with gradient styling)
Process section gap-14 spacing on mobile
Über uns page gradient headline with blue-purple gradient
Über uns page animated stars background (80 stars with slow drift)
4 value cards with hover effects and proper styling
2 team cards with gradient hover effects
CTA section with decorative glow effects
Mobile responsive design - cards stack properly (grid-cols-2 for values, grid-cols-1 for team)
Thumb-friendly button sizing (48px height on mobile)
